title: Long Primer PCR for Trypanosoma brucei
author: Alex Zegarra
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bgcnjsve
materials: PRC Mix 1 uL pPOT (25 ng/uL) 0.2 mM dNTPs 1 uM for primer 1 uM rev primer 1 uL PCR grade DMSO 5uL 10x buffer 2 (Roche) XX uL ddH20 for total volume of 49 uL Add 1 uL Expand High Fidelity polymerase (Roche) once mixture has reached 94 C.
Electroporate the cell once with 1.7 kV, 25 mF (gene pulser (Bio-Rad) or three times 1.7 kV for 100 Ms, 200 ms interval (BTX ECM830 (hardvard Apparatus))

steps.title: Maintain procyclic form SMOX P9 cells...
steps.instruction: Maintain procyclic form SMOX P9 cells [31] between 1x10 6 -1x10 7 cells ml -1 for at least 72 hours prior to transfection to ensure they are in log growth phase.

steps.title: PCR conditions 94 C 5 mins...
steps.instruction: PCR conditions 94 C 5 mins 94 C 15 sec 65 C 30 sec (30 cycles) 72 C 2 min 72 C 7 min

steps.title: Centrifuge 1x10 7 log phase procyclic...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 1x10 7 log phase procyclic cell per transfection at 800 g for 10 min at room temp

steps.title: remove all supernatant
steps.instruction: remove all supernatant

steps.title: Resuspend cells in 500 mL of...
steps.instruction: Resuspend cells in 500 mL of room temperature cytomix per transfection, and add to a 4 mm gap electroporation cuvette

steps.title: Add 50 mL of unpurified PCR to the cell suspension
steps.instruction: Add 50 mL of unpurified PCR to the cell suspension

steps.title: Recover the cells for 8-16 hours...
steps.instruction: Recover the cells for 8-16 hours in 10 ml SDM-79 at 28 C

steps.title: Add the appropriate selective drug to the final concentrations: Blasticidin(Melford)20mg/ml(<20mg
steps.instruction: Add the appropriate selective drug to the final concentrations: Blasticidin(Melford)20mg/ml(<20mg.ml-1is notsufficientto kill off allnon transformedcells). Hygromycin b Gold (Invivogen)25mg/ml(>25mg.ml-1reduces transfection efficiency due to low readthrough transcription of the resistance cassette).

steps.title: If clones are required, dilute 5...
steps.instruction: If clones are required, dilute 5 ml of recovered cells into 50 ml of selective medium and distribute 1 ml aliquots into a 48 well plate.

steps.title: Resistant populations of cells emerge after...
steps.instruction: Resistant populations of cells emerge after 7 – 10 days, and clones emerge after 10 – 14 days.

steps.title: FOLLOW UP Transfection of bloodstream formT
steps.instruction: FOLLOW UP Transfection of bloodstream formT. bruceiusing theAmaxaNucleofector II T. bruceican be efficiently transfected using theAmaxaNucleofector II using the human T-cell kit (VPA-1002 Lonza).
1. Completethe human T-cell Nucleofector solution by addition of supplement 1. The combined solution and supplement can be stored and is stable for 3 months at 4°C.

steps.title: Purify 100ml of long primer PCR...
steps.instruction: Purify 100ml of long primer PCR (~8mg) with onephenol chloroform extractionfollowed by ethanol precipitation at -80°C for 1 hour with two 70% ethanol washes (the pellet should be easily visible). Note that using a silica membrane column instead of phenol chloroform to purify the DNA will reduce transfection efficiency by 10 –50 fold.

steps.title: Resuspend the dried pellet in 10ml 5mM Tris pH8
steps.instruction: Resuspend the dried pellet in 10ml 5mM Tris pH8.

steps.title: Maintain bloodstream form SMOX B4 cells...
steps.instruction: Maintain bloodstream form SMOX B4 cells )" target="_blank" rel="noopener">[31] between 1x105–1x106cells.ml-1for at least 72 hours prior to transfection to ensure they are in log growth phase.

steps.title: Centrifuge 2×107log phase (<1
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 2×107log phase (<1.3x106cells.ml-1) bloodstream form cells per transfection at 800 g for 10 minutes at room temperature.

steps.title: Resuspend the cell pellet in 100ml...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the cell pellet in 100ml of completeAmaxaT cell buffer per transfection, and transfer to anAmaxacuvette.

steps.title: Add the purified DNA to the...
steps.instruction: Add the purified DNA to the cell suspension, and electroporate once using Program X-001.

steps.title: Recover cells for 8 - 16...
steps.instruction: Recover cells for 8 - 16 hours in 50 ml HMI-9 at 37°C with 5% CO2.

steps.title: Add the appropriate selective drug to the final concentrations: Blasticidin(Melford)5mg/ml
steps.instruction: Add the appropriate selective drug to the final concentrations: Blasticidin(Melford)5mg/ml. Hygromycin B Gold (Invivogen)1.5mg/ml.

steps.title: Distribute 1ml aliquots of cells into two 48 well plates
steps.instruction: Distribute 1ml aliquots of cells into two 48 well plates.
